additional_rules.name: options-api-usage
additional_rules.message: Options API pattern detected — use Composition API with <script setup lang="ts"> exclusively
additional_rules.fix_hint: Migrate to <script setup lang="ts">. Replace data() with ref()/reactive(), methods with plain functions, computed: with computed(), lifecycle hooks with onMounted()/onCreated() etc. Pinia replaces Vuex options.

additional_rules.name: this-dollar-access
additional_rules.message: this.$ access detected — in <script setup> there is no 'this'; use Nuxt/Vue composables directly
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace this.$router with useRouter(), this.$route with useRoute(), this.$store with the relevant Pinia store, this.$emit with the emit function from defineEmits().

additional_rules.name: ref-value-in-template
additional_rules.message: Potential .value access in template — Vue auto-unwraps refs in <template>, .value is only needed in <script>
additional_rules.fix_hint: In <template>, access reactive refs directly (e.g., {{ count }} not {{ count.value }}). The .value suffix is required only inside <script setup> and composables.

additional_rules.name: v-html-usage
additional_rules.message: v-html directive found — ensure content is from a trusted source and sanitized to prevent XSS
additional_rules.fix_hint: If the content is user-supplied or from an external API, sanitize it with DOMPurify before rendering. If only static or developer-controlled content, document the trust assumption.

additional_rules.name: runtime-config-public-secret
additional_rules.message: Sensitive value in runtimeConfig.public — runtimeConfig.public is exposed to the client bundle
additional_rules.fix_hint: Move secrets to runtimeConfig (server-only). Access via useRuntimeConfig() in server routes and server plugins only. Client-safe config belongs in runtimeConfig.public.

additional_rules.name: img-instead-of-nuxt-img
additional_rules.message: Raw element — use from @nuxt/image for automatic optimization
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace with for automatic WebP conversion, lazy loading, and responsive sizing.

additional_rules.name: a-tag-for-internal-link
additional_rules.message: Raw <a> for internal link — use <NuxtLink> for client-side navigation with prefetching
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace <a href="/path"> with <NuxtLink to="/path"> to enable client-side routing, prefetching, and active link classes.
